changes.description: New Class I NAV $15.79 (Class Y $15.85, Class R $15.35) as of May 8, 2026 disclosed in inaugural N-23C3A quarterly Repurchase Offer notice (up to 5% of Class I/Y/R Shares; Repurchase Pricing Date June 15, 2026).
Hamilton Lane launched its first quarterly tender offer (Q2 2026) via N-23C3A; offer covers up to 5% of outstanding Class I, Y, and R Shares at NAV on June 15, 2026 Repurchase Pricing Date.
